message:
test(fp-io): add 15 adversarial parser tests for CSV/JSON/SQL (frankenpandas-yby)

Add adversarial input tests per the spec's Tier C assurance requirements:

CSV adversarial:
- Very long field (200K chars) - no panic, correct parsing
- 1000 columns - correct column count
- Empty rows between data - null handling
- Quoted fields with embedded newlines - row boundary preservation
- Header-only (no data rows) - empty DataFrame with correct columns
- Multi-byte UTF-8 values (Japanese, Cyrillic, emoji)
- No trailing newline - correct parsing

JSON adversarial:
- Deeply nested objects as values - stored as Utf8
- i64::MAX and i64::MIN boundary values
- f64 near-MAX and null special values
- Empty arrays and objects

SQL adversarial:
- 10K row batch insert - transaction performance
- Column names with spaces - quoted identifier handling

Total fp-io tests: 81 (66 prior + 15 adversarial).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
